Window.Resources.Aspect: @default { FontFamily = "Segoe UI Variable Text"; FontSize = 14; Foreground = $PaperBrush; }

@default { FontFamily = "Cascadia Mono SemiBold"; FontSize = 11; Background = $TransparentBrush; Foreground = $PaperBrush; BorderBrush = $LineStrongBrush; BorderThickness = "1"; Padding = "16,10,16,10"; } @when IsMouseOver { Background = $CyanWashBrush; Foreground = $CyanBrush; BorderBrush = $CyanBrush; }

TextBlock.Text: The same property binding retargets cleanly while the motion graph owns sampling and conflict resolution.
